title: GetReal Security launches real-time identity verification and deepfake detection platform
summary: GetReal announced general availability of GetReal Protect, combining multimodal deepfake detection with continuous identity verification for voice and video workflows.
relevance: AIGC detection is moving from offline forensic review into live enterprise authentication and incident response.

title: Canon introduces C2PA-compliant Authenticity Imaging System for news organizations
summary: Canon announced a C2PA-based system for supported cameras that preserves provenance from capture through newsroom workflows.
relevance: Secure capture and provenance metadata are becoming a practical complement to detector-only pipelines.

title: YouTube expands AI likeness detection to all adult users
summary: The Verge reported that YouTube is expanding its likeness detection program to users aged 18 or older with a YouTube account.
relevance: Consumer-scale enrollment turns deepfake discovery into a mainstream safety feature and raises new questions about false matches and review workflows.

title: Sumsub launches Adaptive Deepfake Detector for fraud prevention
summary: Sumsub released an upgraded deepfake detection system focused on fast model adaptation and multi-signal fraud analysis.
relevance: The fraud setting emphasizes continual learning, liveness, device signals, and session context beyond media pixels alone.

title: 中央网信办部署开展“清朗·整治AI应用乱象”专项行动
summary: 中央网信办启动为期4个月的专项行动，重点整治生成合成内容标识落实不到位、AI数据投毒、AI换脸拟声滥用等问题。
relevance: 国内治理重点已经从单点内容处置扩展到源头备案、安全审核、标识互认和检测能力建设。

title: 国家广播电视总局通报“AI魔改”视频治理工作取得实效
summary: 广电总局通报专项治理结果，清理大量基于经典电视剧作品进行AI魔改的违规视频，并推动平台建立常态化治理机制。
relevance: AIGC视频检测在国内内容平台中正从研究问题变成审核、版权、文化安全和平台责任问题。

title: 中广联演员委员会就AI换脸合成、声纹克隆、影视素材魔改发布声明
summary: 中国广电联合会演员委员会针对AI换脸、声纹克隆、影视素材魔改和未经授权采集训练数据等侵权行为发布声明。
relevance: 国内演艺行业把检测和溯源需求推向肖像权、声音权、训练数据授权和二创边界。

title: YouTube expands likeness detection to the entertainment industry
summary: YouTube expanded its AI likeness detection access to talent agencies, management companies, and celebrities.
relevance: Large platforms are operationalizing face-likeness detection as a rights and removal workflow, not only as a research benchmark.

title: 小红书要求AI生成合成内容主动标识，未标识内容将限制推荐
summary: 小红书公告称将持续加强AI生成合成内容识别检测能力，未主动标识的AI生成合成内容将由平台添加标识并限制分发。
relevance: 国内社区平台正在把检测结果直接接入分发、补标、申诉和举报机制。

title: UK DSIT publishes analysis of the deepfake detection technology market
summary: The UK Department for Science, Innovation and Technology published a market and evidence review for deepfake detection technology.
relevance: Policy interest is shifting toward supply, demand, barriers, and future growth of detection capabilities.

title: 《人工智能生成合成内容标识办法》正式施行
summary: 国家网信办等四部门发布的标识办法正式施行，要求AI生成的文字、图片、音频、视频和虚拟场景等内容明确标识。
relevance: 国内检测生态有了制度入口，显式标识、隐式标识、元数据和传播端风险提示会影响后续工具与评测。

title: YouTube expands likeness detection to civic leaders and journalists
summary: YouTube began piloting likeness detection access for government officials, journalists, and political candidates.
relevance: High-risk public figures are a key deployment target for deepfake discovery, identity verification, and takedown workflows.

title: Microsoft publishes study on media integrity and authentication methods
summary: Microsoft discussed a media integrity report covering provenance, watermarking, fingerprinting, and their limitations.
relevance: The field is converging on layered authenticity signals instead of relying on a single detector score.

title: UK government announces deepfake detection evaluation framework
summary: The UK government announced work with technology companies, academics, and experts to evaluate deepfake detection tools against real-world threats.
relevance: Benchmarking is becoming a public-sector requirement, especially for fraud, abuse, impersonation, and safety use cases.
